description:
Half-Life Advanced Effects (HLAE) is a tool to enrich Source (mainly CS:GO) engine based movie making.


- Included AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.1 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Included AfxHookSource 1.135.1 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Included AfxHookSource2 0.38.7 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Added fr-FR translation by @playsur3-pixel
AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.1 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Fixed depth recording crashes the game introduced in HLAE 2.188.0
AfxHookSource 1.135.1 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Fixed recording dead-locks for games using non-queued rendering, e.g. CSS V34
AfxHookSource2 0.38.7 (2026-03-13T12:46Z)
- Fixed missing smoke in depth stream
- mirv-script: fixed typo in campath setAngles binding (thanks @wuXinnnn)
- mirv-script: updated BoaJS to v0.21
- mirv-script: added mirv_script_spec_lock snippet
